scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.lint: eslint "client/src/**/*.{ts,tsx}" "server/src/**/*.ts" --max-warnings=0 && npm --prefix client run lint && npm --prefix server run lint
scripts.lint:types: npm --prefix client run lint && npm --prefix server run lint
